scenario: 用户确认长期医疗事实后的跨会话 SQLite 召回

checks.description: Confirmed long-term facts persist across independent SQLite store instances and are deduplicated
Read and write skills expose JSON Tool contracts and execute through ToolRouter
The Memory Update Agent writes a confirmed fact and AgentKernel recalls it for the same user in a new session
A direct greeting answer does not write Long-term Memory
The local CLI persisted a confirmed penicillin allergy and recalled it after a new CLI process started
